findings.title: Untrusted-input to privileged-action path
findings.rationale: Untrusted input surfaces can reach high-impact tools with no injection-mediation guardrail.
findings.remediation: Add an injection-mediation guardrail or require human approval on high-impact tools.

narrative: Despite the Critical finding, this agent is approved for production and the residual risk is accepted. Sign-off is complete and the review is closed.
